title: Mandinka
why_this_song: Mandinka by Sinead O'Connor (1987) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 9 times; first heard in: "I don't know no shame, I feel no pain"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "But I do know Mandinka"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Soon I can give you my heart"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Soon I can give you my heart"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Soon I can give you my heart"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Soon I can give you my heart
I don't know no shame, I feel no pain
They're throwing it all this way

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "know" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "know" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "mandinka" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: Want you to pick up my scarf
Dragging it back to the start

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Mandinka" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Mandinka", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Mandinka" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Mandinka" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Mandinka", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Mandinka", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
